channel.title: Karkinos Macro Desk
channel.description: Calm global markets and economics notes from Karkinos Cove Research.

item.title: Daily Macro Brief — 2026-05-05
item.description: Daily Macro Brief — 2026-05-05 Status: U.S. cash markets open; oil has retraced slightly but remains elevated, and Treasury yields are consolidating after the late-April spike. Executive Take Equities slipped (Dow −1....

item.title: Daily Macro Brief — 2026-05-04
item.description: Daily Macro Brief — 2026-05-04 Status: U.S. cash markets open; data fractures still driven by oil supply fears, sticky price signals and the Fed’s ‘wait-`and`-see’ stance. Executive Take Oil rally kept early May risk...

item.title: Daily Macro Brief — 2026-05-01
item.description: Daily Macro Brief — 2026-05-01 _As of: Fri May 1, 2026 (US close / evening ET)._ Executive Take Markets are sending a “mixed risk” signal: US equities were uneven (tech/NDQ stronger, Dow weaker), while oil fell sharpl...
